final_prompt.prompt:
Create a documentary-style editorial photograph for a 微博 news/trending post banner.

Style/medium: needs a photojournalistic, high-end mobile-shot documentary aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 wide horizontal layout with generous negative space for text overlay; cityscape spread across full width
Subject: must include a city skyline at dusk with neon lights beginning to glow, hurrying pedestrians, and distant skyscrapers reflecting the last sunlight
Scene/backdrop: must include an urban dusk scene — neon signs lighting up, golden sunset reflections on glass towers, street-level crowd in motion
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic, high-contrast golden-hour-to-neon-transition atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm-to-cool dusk direction with neon accent pops — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sharp, high-resolution 8K-texture photographic surface treatment — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "城市里的安静时刻" (large, primary headline, bold modern typeface, prominent placement), "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (secondary subtitle), "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (small watermark, bottom-right corner)
Constraints: must preserve strict 16:9 horizontal framing; text zones must remain uncluttered for overlay legibility; real-scene documentary feel throughout
Avoid: overly stylized CGI look, flat lighting, cluttered composition that obscures text areas
